The problem is that the shufflevector is reordering the operands, so what was originally a zext from %1 becomes a sext from the shuffled vector.

- Original: extract from %0[0] -> sext, extract from %1[0] -> zext
- Transformed: shufflevector %1, %0, <0, 3> creates < %1[0], %0[0] >
- Then both are treated as sext
